title: Reserve Bank of India imposes monetary penalty on Bandhan Bank Limited
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated April 21, 2026 imposed a monetary penalty of ₹41.80 lakh (Rupees Forty One Lakh Eighty Thousand only) on Bandhan Bank Limited (the bank) for contravention of the provisions of section 20(1)(b)(iii) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (BR Act) and non-compliance with certain directions issued by RBI on ‘Know Your Customer’. This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under the provisions of section 4
